name: Catalog Avatar Creator!
description:
Hello! Thought of this concept for a while, just never did it out of fear that it wouldn't be that good. But, you know what they say! "There's a first time for everything"!

First bot, please be nice. Though, constructive criticism is appreciated, as it'll allow me to see what bots YOU guys want!

Don't mind the profile picture, didn't have one of Catalog Avatar Creator.

Again, don't be mean. I tried. Any mean comments WILL get deleted.
creator: Lil_ Bro
